name: Linear source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for Linear: pulls issues as Symphony tasks, and pushes terminal task status back by moving the issue to a completed/canceled workflow state. Reads its API key from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Linear connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_linear).
